question: Under the frozen corrected spatial contract, does ANY non-anticipative policy using available operational information materially beat ABAB, or is the clairvoyant value essentially information-limited?

belief_state.filter_state: augmented semi-Markov state (Z_A, dwell_age_A, Z_B, dwell_age_B); age/residual duration is required for a Markov filter
belief_state.filter_O0: Bayes update from frozen augmented semi-Markov transition + current imperfect signal + observable physical trajectory only
belief_state.filter_O1: O0 update plus lagged realized demand and the signed-off operational ledger
belief_state.filter_validated_before_use: belief must track latent tempo better than the marginal prior (log-loss) or the study reports the filter is uninformative

information_contracts.O0_program_g_exact: only the observations already used in Program G (settles policy-class vs info for the SAME info set)

adds: backlog qty + max age per CSSU

policy_ladder: regret-weighted observable policy (trained on Q(s,a*)-Q(s,a) counterfactuals, NOT action accuracy)

observable_upper_bound.primary_method: QMDP optimistic upper bound on J*_obs
observable_upper_bound.optional_secondary_method: information-relaxation bound only if its algorithm and penalty are frozen in a hashed amendment before 1060001 is opened
observable_upper_bound.property: J_QMDP >= J*_obs (optimistic) -> if J_QMDP - J_ABAB < delta_min then NO observable policy materially beats ABAB
observable_upper_bound.computed_on: ret_order at the frozen 4-week horizon, same tapes, CRN

learner_if_gate_passes.primary: PPO with filtered belief in the observation A_t = pi(X_t, b_t)

outcomes.case_A_information_limited: UB(J*_obs) - J_ABAB < delta_min -> formal information-insufficiency result; virgin 1080001 stays closed; spatial contract terminal
outcomes.case_B_policy_class_limited: a belief-aware policy beats ABAB on 1070001 -> headroom IS observably convertible; the learner gate opens

stop: Program H is the LAST computational extension on the stylized spatial contract. Full-DES port is a separate paper, not before manuscript submission.
forbidden_rescues: select any parameter using learner performance
reuse Program D-G tapes for selection
train PPO before the belief-policy gate passes
fit policies by action accuracy instead of regret
start the full-DES port before submitting the manuscript
